ChatDigest.title: ChatDigest
ChatDigest.description: Metadata and high-level analytical metrics for a WhatsApp parsed chat log.

fileSize.description: Original text file size in bytes

parsedAt.description: Epoch timestamp when the log was parsed

startDateStr.description: First date in the chat timeline

endDateStr.description: Last date in the chat timeline

MessageChunk.title: MessageChunk
MessageChunk.description: A chunk of parsed chat messages stored sequentially to abide by Firestore limits.

ZipAttachment.title: ZipAttachment
ZipAttachment.description: A media file attachment stored in base64 format.

users/{userId}/digests/{digestId}.description: Metadata, analytics, and summary roadmap details.

users/{userId}/digests/{digestId}/attach.description: Decompressed rich media files in base64.
